review: We have had nothing but amazing service from Integra during our 6 years with them! I wish they could take over the rest of our condo association!!!My admiration of them went up even more recently when they took over and handeled everything for us when our tenants abandoned the unit. They're AMAZING!!!!!!!

Where do I start?My Wife and I purchased a Townhouse at Bay Rim Condo's on Birch Bay almost 4 years ago and we thought we'd be there through our retirement but....Integra ruined a good thing!!!Worst Property Management Company EVER!!!!And that's being nice!Cindy Rae acts like she owns the Property and uses the the HOA Board to start trouble.She is a very Unlikeable person who has a SERIOUS attitude!!She forgets that she works for the people at Bay Rim and I had a few words with her and we decided we were going to move... which we did!Worst experience of our lives!!!!If you need a company to manage your Property...find someone else!!!They charge you for EVERYTHING!!Move In fees...Move Out fees....total BS if you ask me!I've worked in Property Management and this is NOT how you handle a Portfolio!!!Do yourselves a favor and stay clear on Integra!!!!!!If I could give NO Stars I would
I lived in an apartment under their business for a year.It's awful. Unprofessional. Staffs are rude and unfriendly.When things happen, they do nothing even it's their responsibility.

(If I could give no stars I would.)Do yourself a favor and run a very long way away from this company. Their rudeness is only exceeded by their questionable ethics. You will find better rental and property management companies in the area. These people are the absolute worst.

I spoke with a woman today named Peggy. She was probably the rudest person I have had to encounter in a long time. I regret that I may have to talk to her again in the future but I can tell you that I will refuse to talk to her. She is definitely a very unhappy person and in the wrong line of work. She tried to belittle me over the phone and that is just not going to happen again. I feel sorry for this company that has this person as their first point of contact.

This is the worst rental management company I have ever had to deal with. They will steal your application fee. They take application fees to apartments they know they will not be renting to you, and refuse to refund you your money.Their customer service is terrible. They will not let you know important information. They will not contact you when there is information you should know about your lease. They charge you for every little thing they can, don't give any of your security deposit back, and charge you fines until you have paid an extra $200/month in fees. There was no reason for them to treat me this way. I consistently turned in my rent on time, paid all of my bills and was a quiet and respectful tenant. I can only hope this stops people from using them as a property management company or from renting from them. It is not worth it.

Haven't even bought the condo under their management yet and I already don't like them. I called to ask questions and Tess could not have been less helpful. She just kept saying "did you read the certificate?" Yes. I did. It is a legal doc and I just wanted quick clarification because, Hey, Tess, this is your area of expertise, not mine! I think you could do with a course in customer service skills because that is my area and you would be fired! I am buying a condo and can't wait to recommend that Integra be replaced!

I hope this prevents another person from applying for a rental from Integra. They are the worst landlord company in Bellingham. They will take your application fee knowing a listing has already been promised to a different tenant. It's really akin to theft. They are rude and unresponsive. Yuck! Stay away from this landlord!!! If I could have given them 0 stars, I would have.

Not sure how Jenn X. could rate this company five stars? Maybe she is a friend of the company or didn't have many real encounters with them. I wouldn't even give the 1 star if I could. I echo the sentiments exactly of all the other 1 star reviews. I wanna thank these people for leaving these reviews because this company is downright unethical. Terrible service, rude, they will lie and make up stories and do just about anything to get out of taking care of the things they are supposed to take care of. Definitely my worst experience ever with a property management company. You know when so many reviews in a row are one star and all say the same thing you should steer clear. Stay away. Also look at the Google reviews online, same horror stories. I could tell my whole story but just look at all the 1 star reviews before me and you will know my story, exactly the same as what they say. Very dishonest unethical company.
